name: LoggerContext
activities: Provide hot-swap wrapper for logger access
Allow logger replacement without invalidating closures
Thread through test helper → setup → Capo hierarchy

name: TestFileLogger
activities: Aggregate all logs from test file into single stream
Insert stub log lines pointing to focused test outputs

name: DecoratedIt
activities: Extend vitest it() with slug-based test identification
Support optional config object with LOGGING

name: LoggerThreading
activities: Thread LoggerContext through object creation hierarchy
Define EXPECTS for Capo, delegates, UtxoHelper, StellarTxnContext

name: UILoggerProvider
activities: Provide React context wrapping LoggerContext for UI
notes: React provider around the generic LoggerContext (ARCH-28b90zs38k). Not a separate wrapper class — uses same LoggerContext as tests.

name: BrowserLogPipeline
activities: Route stellog output to browser console with CSS styling

name: DREDLogTransport
activities: Stream logs to remote DRED channel for debugging

name: StellarTestHelper console.log migration
notes: ~25 console.log/warn/error calls to migrate: actor setup, network time, init lifecycle, txn submission

name: CapoTestHelper console.log migration
notes: ~55 console.log calls: snapshot cache ops, Capo lifecycle, actor restore, debug diagnostics

name: Capo.ts console.log migration
notes: ~50 console.log/warn calls: delegate connection, charter ops, minting, txn building

name: StellarContract.ts console.log migration
notes: ~30 console.log/warn calls: bundle init, script compilation, identity verification

name: StellarTxnContext console.log migration
notes: ~35 console.log/warn calls: txn building, submission, cost reporting

name: UplcConsoleLogger
notes: Specialized logger for contract validation - coexists with stellog, not replaced

name: dual-logger-coexistence
notes: UplcStellogAdapter bridges UPLC traces to stellog: uplc:receipt (visual) + uplc:detail (granular)

name: UplcStellogAdapter
activities: Preserve group context in granular entries

name: uplc:receipt
notes: Complete visual receipt (box-drawing) as single log entry for human viewing

name: uplc:detail
notes: Granular per-step trace entries with group context for programmatic analysis

name: offchain runtime threading
notes: Capo.init must thread to bundle, delegates; read/write paths both need logging

name: read-path-logging
notes: Read path is cheap but still needs structured logging for debugging

name: write-path-logging
notes: Write path includes compilation; needs progress/timing logs

name: SetupInfo.loggerContext
notes: REQUIRED LoggerContext on SetupInfo. No fallback — all SetupInfo construction must supply a LoggerContext. Breaking change for downstream.

name: TestHelperState logger fields
notes: loggerContext, testFileLogger, processUut added to helperState for cross-test persistence

name: process-uut-lifecycle
notes: nanoid(10) uniquely identifies test run for log organization

name: createTestContext-logger-integration
notes: Modified beforeEach flow in createTestContext for logger setup

name: snapshot-operations-logging
notes: Structured logging for CapoTestHelper snapshot operations via capo:snapshot facility

name: Layered Architecture Model
notes: Six-layer decomposition: L0 pino, L1 stellog, L2 Destinations, L3 LoggerContext, L4 Context Threading, L5 Test Orchestration, L6 Specialized Bridges. Clarifies testLogger.ts disposition (superseded, decomposed into layers).

name: Destinations layer
notes: Layer 2: Where log output goes. Produce pino.DestinationStream objects. Replaces testLogger.ts destination management.

name: LoggerContext layer
notes: Layer 3: Hot-swap wrapper. Context-agnostic — same class in test and UI. Critical invariant: MUST NOT cache .logger or .child().

name: Context Threading layer
notes: Layer 4: Propagates LoggerContext through object creation graphs. Test: helperState → setup → Capo → delegates → tcx. UI: React context → setup → same.

name: Test Orchestration layer
notes: Layer 5: Manages logger lifecycle within vitest. DecoratedIt, createTestContext integration, LOG_TEST, process-UUT.

name: Specialized Bridges layer
notes: Layer 6: Sits alongside L2. UplcStellogAdapter bridges UplcLogger interface to stellog facilities (uplc:receipt + uplc:detail).
